headline.text: L1 closed the window with *5 open issues* including white chocolate melting trouble on Sollich 2 and a belt-tracking problem on Sollich 3.

per_plant_summary.L1: Sollich 2 ran changeover flushes overnight and started filling white chocolate, but melting tank 1 is keeping product on top instead of fully melting as of 07:08. Tunnel 2 was left without a filter. Separator table belt shows damage with no repair logged. Sollich 3 ran all day but tunnel 1 belt is tracking west despite a maintenance adjustment. Warehouse hit an RF-smart receiving error on Oreos.
per_plant_summary.L2: No activity in the last 24 hours.
per_plant_summary.L3: ML1 ran without deviation after clearing two problems — tempering tank temperature climbed back into range by 16:16 and maintenance trimmed the damaged demolding belt at 20:10. Dorner 1 is damaged and will need Monday inspection. ML4's missing scraper, gone since April 3, has no spare; team is ordering.

notes.text: ML4 team met every launch goal (OEE, scrap, downtime, headcount) on the HER Salted Caramel 13.3g first run.
Cardboard vendor coordination with International Paper and driver needed; Chad asked Benjamin Hicks to follow up Monday.

resolved.title: C6 cross conveyor allergen test pending
resolved.summary: Conveyor cleaned and waiting on allergen test results before resuming use.

resolved.title: CL tank temperature below range
resolved.summary: Chocolate line tank temp read low against a 45-51 target; maintenance raised setpoint and circulation held temp as it climbed back.
resolved.resolution: Temperature back to normal by 16:16; team lowered mixing water to balance temper and last reading was 0.0 (Nathan Gevenois).

resolved.title: Demolding belt damage at Imperial discharge
resolved.summary: Quality flagged worn material in the demolding area; belt was replaced two weeks prior after almond run and likely had an installation issue.
resolved.resolution: Line stopped at 20:01, maintenance trimmed the damaged section; Lorena confirmed "Maintenance did a good job. It turned out really well" at 20:10.

needs_attention.title: White chocolate not melting in MT1
needs_attention.summary: Melting tank 1 filled with white chocolate that heats but stays on top instead of fully melting; product won't flow properly to next stage.
needs_attention.status: Chocolate is hot but remains on top of tank as of 07:08; no fix attempted in the window.

needs_attention.title: Tunnel 1 belt tracking west after adjustment
needs_attention.summary: Cooling tunnel 1 belt favors west side despite maintenance adjustment; ops believes dirty rollers are root cause and belt should be cleaned at next production stop.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance improved tracking but belt still favors west side; William says line can continue as scheduled, Caleb recommends stopping to clean rollers.

needs_attention.title: RF-smart Oreo receiving error
needs_attention.summary: Warehouse cannot receive Oreos in RF-smart; system throws "This order is being received by someone else" error.
needs_attention.status: Error blocking Oreo receipt as of 21:50; no resolution or workaround logged.

needs_attention.title: Tunnel 2 left without filter
needs_attention.summary: QA reported tunnel 2 missing filter; confirmed by Elizabeth at 23:31 with no follow-up showing replacement.
needs_attention.status: Elizabeth confirmed tunnel 2 was left without a filter at 23:31; no installation logged by window close.

needs_attention.title: Separator table belt damage
needs_attention.summary: Belt on separator table shows damage; cause and extent unknown.
needs_attention.status: Luis reported damage at 03:18 and noted uncertainty whether it was pre-existing; no repair action in this window.

needs_attention.title: Dorner 1 damaged, Monday inspection required
needs_attention.summary: Dorner 1 conveyor is damaged; full inspection scheduled for Monday to determine if replacement is needed.
needs_attention.status: Kimberly flagged damage at 04:19 and noted Monday inspection required; no interim fix or assessment by window close.

needs_attention.title: ML4 scraper missing since April
needs_attention.summary: A specific scraper has been missing since April 3; no spares available and team is ordering replacements.
needs_attention.status: Preston confirmed no spares on hand at 15:54 and will order as soon as possible; scraper remains unavailable.
